name: HTS_WORKLOAD_PLANS_
description: Workload demand items planned to repeat each day inside some date range.

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key identifiying the publish event record by a system generated ID

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_MODE
columns.Comments: The import type will indicate either 'T' for time based imports or 'S' for shift based imports.

columns.Name: SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: Shift ID

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_PLAN_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for a record provided by the user

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: DELETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag to support soft delete. Value 'Y' indicates that the record is deleted. Null or 'N' values indicate the record is not deleted.

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_TYPE
columns.Comments: Workload import type

columns.Name: SKILL_ID
columns.Comments: Skill ID

columns.Name: SHIFT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the shift is Regular or On-Call or any custom shift type

columns.Name: SCHED_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Scheduling Unit ID

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start of the date range for which the window plan is defined

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: End of the date range for which the workload plan is defined

columns.Name: START_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Start time of the workload plan saved as offset in minutes from the day start

columns.Name: END_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: End time of the workload plan saved as offset in minutes from the day start

columns.Name: INPUT_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Record source, either import or UI

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_VALUE
columns.Comments: Workload value

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_UOM
columns.Comments: Unit of Measure for the Workload Vaue

columns.Name: ORIGIN_SYSTEM_REF
columns.Comments: External source system for an imported workload plan

columns.Name: SOURCE_SYSTEM_KEY
columns.Comments: External source system ID for the workload plan

columns.Name: WORKLOAD_IMPORT_TAG
columns.Comments: Optional tag to identify an imported set of records

columns.Name: MON_FLAG
columns.Comments: Monday is part of day of week for this workload

columns.Name: TUE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Tuesday is part of day of week for this workload

columns.Name: WED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Wednesday is part of day of week for this workload

columns.Name: THU_FLAG
columns.Comments: Thursday is part of day of week for this workload

columns.Name: FRI_FLAG
columns.Comments: Friday is part of day of week for this workload

columns.Name: SAT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Saturday is part of day of week for this workload

columns.Name: SUN_FLAG
columns.Comments: Sunday is part of day of week for this workload

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: MOCK_DISCRIMINATOR
columns.Comments: MOCK_DISCRIMINATOR

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Action Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1s and 0s for each column in the table.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Original Impersonator User.
